description: Create a content slide with a left navigation sidebar and a two-column layout showing horizontal bar charts of machine task share by industry, plus a right-hand text callout on how automation complements or substitutes humans.

header.headline: All industries will experience a shift towards automation – Depending on tasks and sectors, machines will either complement or substitute humans
header.sub: Share of task hours carried out by machines by selected industry [%]

main.title: Share of task hours carried out by machines by selected industry

items.text: Depending on tasks and sectors, machines will either complement or substitute humans
